title: Frisbee Golf in the Park
shortDesc: An easy, fun outdoor game the whole family can play — perfect for all ages and skill levels.
description: Frisbee golf (disc golf) is one of those rare activities that genuinely works for every age, from toddlers to grandparents. Throw a frisbee at basket targets across a scenic outdoor course. No experience needed, easy to learn in minutes, and a brilliant way to enjoy Samui's beautiful outdoor spaces. Equipment hire available on site.
